pages.title: Crops
pages.text: Crops can be obtained by trading with a Cultivator using Buried Eclipse Tokens. Once acquired, they can be grown on tilled dirt like normal crops. These crops yield unique materials used in crafting and consumables. While they grow under familiar conditions, their properties are far from ordinary.

pages.title: Infernalpod Seeds
pages.text: A more volatile crop variant with stronger outputs.

pages.title: Voidblossom Petal
pages.text: A harvested material used in crafting.
